name: 1Password
philosophy: 1Password's web presence is security-trust-as-friendly chrome — a deep navy (#0a2540) as the primary anchor, a soft sky blue (#5b8def) as the brand accent, and illustration-driven heroes featuring people in everyday secure contexts (logging into accounts, sharing access with family). The atmosphere is friendly enterprise security: confident but approachable, never alarm-bell, never dark-pattern.

design_language.motion_signature: Gentle micro-interactions — vault icons may have a subtle 'unlock' animation on hover, the lock icon clicks closed/open with a 150ms spring. Hero illustrations have idle gestures.

trademark_signals: 1Password Navy (#0a2540) — the deep blue trust anchor
1Password Sky (#5b8def) — the bright accent on CTAs and key UI moments
Vault icon — the blue safe-door visual metaphor
Friendly illustration heroes — everyday secure-living contexts
Soft rounded cards (8–16px radius) — approachable security
ai_slop_avoided: Don't lean into alarm-bell security imagery (locks, warnings, red shields)
Don't replace 1Password Navy with a brighter saturated tech-blue — the deep navy is the trust anchor
Don't sanitize the illustration heroes to generic enterprise stock
